topic: why is my sales pipeline not working
hook: Most B2B sales teams have a stack problem disguised as a pipeline problem.
body_guidance:
They buy Why tools. They hire SDRs. They add Clay. They add Apollo. They wait for pipeline.

What they get is reps spending 65% of their day on admin.

The insight nobody says out loud: the more tools you add, the worse the handoff tax gets.

The fix is not another tool. It is one system that owns the entire chain.
cta: We run this entire system for B2B sales teams at Pipeleap. Link in bio.
target_keyword: why is my sales pipeline not working

hook: Here is the exact sequence we use to go from cold list to CRM opportunity in 72 hours.
body_guidance:
Step 1: Trigger from intent signal or list upload
Step 2: Enrich with firmographic + technographic data
Step 3: Score against ICP model (threshold: 70+)
Step 4: Route to personalised outreach sequence
Step 5: Handle reply, book meeting, write back to CRM

The whole thing runs without a rep touching it until the meeting is booked.

We built this for revenue operations platform — and we operate it for clients end-to-end.
cta: We deploy this for clients in 2 to 4 weeks. DM me if you want to see it.
